video_subject: An armored Indian knight in ornate, battle-worn steel plate armor, standing on a jagged rocky cliff facing a colossal medieval fortress. Two enormous dragons circle through dark storm clouds above.
motion_dynamics: Dragons soaring with rhythmic wing beats; lightning illuminating the clouds; the knight's heavy cape flapping violently in the coastal gale; smoke rising from the fortress in the distance.
temporal_storyboard: 0s: Grand wide shot of the knight overlooking the valley where the massive fortress sits.
4s: A dragon dives from the clouds, its shadow passing over the knight as they grip their sword hilt.
8s: Close-up on the knight's face, jaw set with determination, with the fortress and dragons in the blurred background.
visual_style: Medieval Fantasy Epic. Camera: Cinema 70mm Film, Lens: Anamorphic Classic, Focal Length: 35mm, Aperture: f/8. Warm Fine Grain film stock, Golden Ancient Rome movie look. Monumental cinematic scale.
negative_prompt: shaky camera, low framerate, flickering, distorted faces, text, watermarks, morphing artifacts, generic CGI, modern technology, bright neon colors.
